rules.rule_text:
rule APT1_WEBC2_TABLE
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$msg1 = "Fail To Execute The Command" wide ascii
		$msg2 = "Execute The Command Successfully" wide ascii
		$gif1 = /\w+\.gif/
		$gif2 = "GIF89" wide ascii

	condition:
		3 of them
}
